titles.title: The Lord Is My Shepherd / Psalm 23 / I Am Not Alone

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Lord is my Shepherd He goes before me Defender behind me I won't fear I'm filled with anointing My cup's overflowing No weapon can harm me I won't fear

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hallelujah, I am not alone He's my Comfort, always holds me close

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He always guides me Through mountains and valleys His joy is refreshing Restores my soul Mercy and goodness Give me assurance That I'll see His glory Face to face

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah, I am not alone He's my Comfort, always holds me close Hallelujah, I am not alone He's my Comfort, always holds me close

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Your Spirit lives within me So I will walk in Your peace Your Spirit lives within me My victory, my victory :/ x4

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: My victory, my victory My victory, my victory My victory, my victory My victory…
